message:
feat(harness): add stdio_evidence.rs JSONL schema and parser

Per bd-9chy.4 and Plan v4 §14:
- Define StdioEvidenceRow schema with all required fields
- Add event_kind enum (StreamAcquired, Read, Write, etc.)
- Add fp_origin enum (Native, Foreign, Standard, Memory)
- Add ProcessInfo, StdioParams, StdioResult structs
- Add MembraneStages and RuntimeMathState for instrumentation
- Implement StdioEvidenceIterator for parsing JSONL files
- Add schema version checking with backwards compat policy
- All 5 round-trip and parsing tests pass

br-bd-9chy.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
